title: Shell / CLI Extension Profile
summary: Defines a shell and CLI semantic extension profile over the existing metadata model so shell entrypoints, parameters, verification expectations, and projection targets can be expressed without introducing a parallel shell authority model.

open_items.title: Projection binding granularity
open_items.detail: The exact binding strategy from shell semantic targets to Bashly/argc/Argbash/Bats/ShellSpec outputs remains to be formalized beyond the demonstrated Bashly and Bats example posture.

resolved_items.title: Authority location
resolved_items.detail: Shell/CLI work must build on the existing metadata model rather than introducing a parallel shell authority model.

resolved_items.title: Projection posture
resolved_items.detail: Shell scripts, wrappers, and test harnesses are treated as projection targets or consumers, not metadata authority.

resolved_items.title: Extension constraint posture
resolved_items.detail: The shell/CLI extension profile is now backed by schema-validated extension constraints rather than prose-only conventions.
